underlying_goal: Build and iteratively refine a lazy-loading trading analyzer UI with candle charts, indicator panels, signal scoring, and backtest browsing
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly misunderstood the backtest popover requirement—editing the wrong page, using wrong component types, placing invisible buttons with unregistered icons—requiring multiple frustrated corrections from the user.
brief_summary: User built a comprehensive lazy-loading trading analyzer UI across many files over a long session; mostly achieved despite significant friction around the backtest selector feature where Claude repeatedly misunderstood scope and implementation details.
